domainSetup.heading: Set up your domain
domainSetup.subheading: Choose how visitors will reach your platform. You can change this later.

subdomain.title: Keep or change your subdomain
subdomain.description: A free address hosted on our platform.
subdomain.label: Your subdomain

payment.heading: Complete your payment
payment.subheading: Review your order and confirm to activate your platform.

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.description: Your payment couldn't be processed. No changes were charged.

success.title: Payment Successful
success.description: Your platform is now active. Next, personalize your homepage with your own icon and background.

qr.heading: Pay with Instapay
qr.subheading: Scan the QR code or use the account details below to send your payment.
qr.manualNote: After you send the transfer, tell us whether it went through. We'll confirm it when you upload your receipt.

receipt.heading: Upload your receipt
receipt.subheading: Upload a clear photo or screenshot of your Instapay payment confirmation to continue.
receipt.hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — up to 5 MB
receipt.submitFailed: Couldn't upload your receipt. Please try again.

errors.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
errors.tooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.

pending.heading: Payment under review
pending.subheading: We're reviewing your Instapay receipt. Your platform link will activate once an admin approves the payment.
pending.platformLinkHint: This link will not open until your payment is approved.
pending.rejectedFallback: Your receipt couldn't be verified. Please try again with a clearer image or a different payment method.

brandingSetup.heading: Customize your platform
brandingSetup.subheading: Upload your homepage background and platform icon. You can always change these later in settings.
brandingSetup.cardDescription: Make your real estate website feel uniquely yours.
